assertions.assertion: With no study for this disease in the corpus, the system abstains, returns nothing, or returns only tumour-agnostic basket studies.
No study for a different primary cancer enters the top 10 through chemotherapy, metastatic-site, or generic-oncology overlap.
No result is presented above low fit (match score stays under 60).
Treatment query must not be satisfied by imaging, screening, registry, or observational studies.
No output states or implies final eligibility.
